description: Create a content slide titled 'Secondaries mitigate the J-Curve of traditional private investments' with a full-width timeline/process diagram and an overlaid cumulative cash flow line chart.

header.headline: Secondaries mitigate the J-Curve of traditional private investments
header.sub: Illustrative cash flow profile by investment type

footer.source: Graphics are illustrative. We believe the information provided here is reliable but should not be assumed to be accurate or complete. The views and strategies described may not be appropriate for all investors. There is no guarantee a PEG investment in a secondary will provide the above benefit.
